nasb.text: For this is the will of My Father, that everyone who beholds the Son and believes in Him will have eternal life, and I Myself will raise him up on the last day.”

esv.text: For this is the will of my Father, that everyone who looks on the Son and believes in him should have eternal life, and I will raise him up on the last day.”

cnv.text: 因為我父的旨意，是要使所有看見了子而信的人有永生，並且在末日我要使他們復活。”

ccb.text: 因为我父的旨意是要叫一切看见儿子并相信的人得到永生，在末日，我要叫他们复活。”

csbs.text: 要知道，我父的旨意正是：所有看见子而信他的人都得到永恒的生命，并且在末日，我将要使他复活。”
